description_long: This nightstand is a low, square wooden table with a simple, sturdy frame and no visible drawers or handles. The tabletop is adorned with a collection of objects: two ceramic mugs, a dark green glass bottle with a maroon cap, and a tall, rectangular white ceramic bottle with swirling decorative patterns and a cork stopper. The wood has a natural, matte finish with visible grain, and the legs are thick and blocky, providing a stable base. The ceramic mugs are cylindrical, one with a handle and the other with a carved swirl motif, while the bottles add a touch of visual interest with their contrasting shapes and colors. The overall design is utilitarian, with a hint of decorative flair from the tabletop items. This piece would fit well in an urban outdoor or semi-public setting, such as a parklet, sidewalk café, or communal gathering area.
description: A sturdy, square wooden nightstand with block legs, topped with two ceramic mugs and two decorative bottles. The tabletop features both functional and ornamental items, adding visual interest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop with all four items clearly visible: two mugs in front, two bottles behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall white bottle's decorative swirls and the arrangement of mugs and bottles from the right.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backs of the two bottles, with the mugs partially obscured.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the green bottle's profile and the mugs more prominently, with the white bottle in the background.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside seating or in communal outdoor areas
